intent: Preserve the approved soft Santa concierge while making fake-perfect AI polish a hard reject through body, posture, face, beard, hair, hands, and clothing continuity cues.

sourceExpectations.minimumUse: native high-resolution source suitable for later transparent sprite staging
sourceExpectations.composition: single full-body character, neutral studio background, generous safe padding, no cropped hands or feet
sourceExpectations.identityContinuity: same older face, softer belly, beard shape, posture rhythm, body mass, and warm concierge presence across every outfit and pose
sourceExpectations.promotionState: prompt artifact only; coordinator must generate sources, run preflight, build review boards, and receive final approval before promotion

globalHumanImperfectionCues: soft rounded belly under tailored clothing
relaxed shoulders with slight natural unevenness
asymmetrical warm smile, not a perfect commercial grin
warm tired eyes with subtle under-eye softness
real skin texture, no plastic or airbrushed face
full white beard with groomed but uneven edges and flyaway hairs
natural older hands with clean anatomy
premium fabrics with lived-in creases, never dirty or shabby
globalRejects: beard shaped like a smooth helmet
cropped hands, feet, props, or silhouette
text, watermark, logo, halo, or blurry source

continuityNotes: dark refined concierge coat or vest
polished practical shoes with tiny wear
tailoring reveals the softer belly without mockery

poses.promptAddOn: Otis stands at ease in the approved concierge base outfit, weight slightly on one foot, hands loose and natural, soft belly readable, one shoulder sitting slightly lower, warm calm expression.
Otis offers a gentle welcome in the base outfit, one hand raised naturally, slight forward lean, asymmetrical smile, kind tired eyes, full body uncropped.
Otis listens patiently in the base outfit, head tilted a little, hands loosely folded near the vest, relaxed uneven shoulders, beard edges imperfect but groomed.
Otis thinks quietly in the base outfit, one hand at his chin or beard with realistic fingers, eyes down and aside, posture human and grounded, not wizard-like.
Otis talks in the base outfit with one open-hand gesture, natural mid-sentence mouth, no perfect smile, belly and fabric creases still visible.
Otis turns attentive in the base outfit, posture slightly straighter but not heroic, focused eyes, one hand slightly lifted, soft belly and concierge calm preserved.
Otis works in the base outfit, checking a folded note or small clipboard with older natural hands, slight forward lean, premium practical warmth.

continuityNotes: structured dark wool coat over the same approved identity
warm scarf or collar detail allowed
coat must not hide body softness
formal but still approachable and lived-in

poses.promptAddOn: Otis stands at ease in the formal Tower door coat, weight settled naturally, one lapel sitting slightly imperfectly, softer belly still readable beneath the coat.
Otis greets in the formal door coat, one hand raised with practical older fingers, friendly asymmetrical smile, coat fabric creasing naturally around his middle.
Otis listens in the formal door coat, head gently tilted, shoulders relaxed and uneven under the coat, warm tired eyes, beard flyaways visible.
Otis thinks in the formal door coat, one hand near beard or coat front, eyes reflective, no model pose, no perfect symmetry, full body uncropped.
Otis explains something in the formal door coat, one hand open, expression kind and specific, coat edge slightly askew in a believable human way.
Otis becomes alert in the formal door coat, protective but calm, posture a little straighter, not action-hero, softer belly and warm concierge identity intact.
Otis works in the formal door coat, checking a key ring or note, older hands clear, slight forward lean, coat creases natural and premium.

continuityNotes: small key ring, clipboard, tablet, or folded note optional
active but never frantic or goofy

poses.promptAddOn: Otis idles in the working waistcoat, sleeves slightly relaxed, hands near his middle, softer belly under the waistcoat, one shoulder lower, lovable grounded stance.
Otis greets in the working waistcoat, one open hand raised, warm imperfect smile, natural older hands, subtle fabric strain and creases around the belly.
Otis listens in the working waistcoat, head tilt and patient eyes, hands folded or one hand near a key ring, beard and hair imperfect but cared for.
Otis thinks in the working waistcoat, fingers at beard or chin with clean anatomy, gentle forward head posture, real skin texture, no generic wizard look.
Otis talks in the working waistcoat, one hand explaining, relaxed shoulders, soft belly and natural asymmetry visible, expression clear at app scale.
Otis is alert in the working waistcoat, eyes focused, hand lifted near clipboard or key ring, calm protective concierge energy, not superhero posture.
Otis works in the waistcoat, reading or writing on a small clipboard or tablet, older hands fully visible, slight forward lean, premium lived-in detail.

reviewQuestions: Does Otis still look premium and competent, or did imperfection become sloppiness?
Is the softer belly visible in every outfit without becoming a joke?
Do beard, hair, face, and posture remain consistent across all poses?
Would this sprite still read as warm and human at app scale?
